patch.value: Harden extensionNeedsActivationForProbe: non-terminal search gate + command-bearing importers
Fix the search early-return that shadows conservative command activation, and treat importers as command-bearing so its registered commands dispatch without declared activation.commands.

extensionNeedsActivationForProbe hardened: search gate is non-terminal (no longer shadows conservative command activation), and importers activate as command-bearing on direct invocation. Verified search+commands and pure-importers dispatch with and without declared activation.commands.
